Interface DRIComponent

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
DRIBooleanField, DRIBreak, DRIChart, DRICrosstab, DRICurrentDate, DRICustomComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRIEllipse, DRIFiller, DRIFormatField, DRIGenericElement, DRIHyperLinkComponent, DRIImage, DRILine, DRIList, DRIMap, DRIMultiPageList, DRIPageNumber, DRIPageXofY, DRIRectangle, DRISubreport, DRITextField<T>, DRITotalPages, DRIXyList
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRBooleanField, DRBreak, DRChart, DRComponent, DRCrosstab, DRCurrentDate, DRDimensionComponent, DREllipse, DRFiller, DRFormatField, DRGenericElement, DRHyperLinkComponent, DRImage, DRLine, DRList, DRMap, DRMultiPageList, DRPageNumber, DRPageXofY, DRRectangle, DRSubreport, DRTextField, DRTotalPages, DRXyList
public interface DRIComponent extends Serializable

DRIComponent interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
